meaning: Friend or elder brother (common in Delhi/UP)
emotionalMeaning: A friendly term used as a bro/dude slang
exampleSentence: Kya bolte bawa, sab theek? (What's up bro, all good?)

emotionalMeaning: Used mostly in anger or friendly banter to call someone stupid
exampleSentence: Shey ekta bokachoda! (He is a complete idiot!)

emotionalMeaning: Equivalent to 'bal' or 'nonsense' expressions. Expresses annoyance
exampleSentence: Kya kela baat kar raha hai! (What nonsense are you talking!)
